from starlette.middleware.base import BaseHTTPMiddleware
from starlette.requests import Request


class OrderValidationMiddleware(BaseHTTPMiddleware):
    async def dispatch(self, request: Request, call_next):
        if request.url.path.startswith("/api/orders") and request.method == "POST":
            body = await request.json()
            if body.get("total", 0) > 10000:
                if not body.get("approved_by"):
                    return JSONResponse(
                        status_code=400,
                        content={"error": "Large orders require approval"},
                    )
            if body.get("items") and len(body["items"]) > 100:
                return JSONResponse(
                    status_code=400,
                    content={"error": "Too many items in order"},
                )
        return await call_next(request)


class PricingMiddleware(BaseHTTPMiddleware):
    async def dispatch(self, request: Request, call_next):
        if "/api/products" in request.url.path:
            response = await call_next(request)
            body = json.loads(response.body)
            for product in body.get("products", []):
                if product["category"] == "electronics":
                    product["price"] *= 1.1
                elif product["category"] == "clothing":
                    product["price"] *= 0.9
            return JSONResponse(content=body)
        return await call_next(request)
